package rulecoverage

func PositiveDbPoolLimitsNotConfiguredAtBoot() string {
    ruleID := "db_pool_limits_not_configured_at_boot"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Bootstrap code that opens long-lived DB clients without visible pool sizing or lifetime limits."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
